title: Lifestyle Advisory Limited is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Lifestyle Advisory Limited is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Lifestyle Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Floor Manager at our Varanasi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Lifestyle Advisory Limited:
Lifestyle Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lifestyle Advisory Limited!
